name: Oxytocin
description: Ihomoni ye-peptide engapheliyo. Umgca wokuqala we-uterotonic wokuthintela kunye nokunyangwa kwe-postpartum hemorrhage (PPH). Ibangela ukunyanzeliswa kwesibeleko kunye nokunciphisa ukulahleka kwegazi emva kokunikezelwa. Inikwe EMVA kokunikezelwa kwe-placenta.
indications: Ukuthintela ukopha kwangemva kokubeleka (isiqhelo emva kokunikezelwa)
dose: Uthintelo lwe-PPH: Iiyunithi ezili-10 ze-IM ngokukhawuleza emva kokunikezelwa kwe-placenta (indlela ekhethwayo yasendle). Unyango lwe-PPH: iiyunithi ze-10-40 kwi-1L IV, zifake kwi-40-80 mU / min. Ukuba i-IV ayifumaneki: iiyunithi ezili-10 ze-IM.
window: Nika EMVA kokubeleka kwe-placenta--ukunika ngaphambi kokuba i-placenta ibeleke inokubamba i-placenta.
contraindications: Uxinzelelo lwe-Fetal kunye nentloko engakhange inikezelwe
warnings: NIKEZA EMVA KOKWENZIWA KWE-placenta -- ukubambisa i-placenta yingxaki ebeka ubomi esichengeni.
I-IV bolus inokubangela i-hypotension enzima kunye ne-cardiac arrhythmia-hlala ihlanjululwa kwaye ifake ngokukhawuleza.

obstetric.note: I-uterotonic yokuqala. Ukuba i-atony yesibeleko ayiphenduli, qwalasela i-misoprostol, i-tranexamic acid (TXA), i-bimanual uterine compression, kunye ne-MEDEVAC esheshayo.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / WHO PPH Guidelines
